topIngredients.name: Bio-Collagen Film
topIngredients.benefit: Hydrogel matrix that melts into skin to deliver deep hydration

topIngredients.name: Niacinamide
topIngredients.benefit: Evens skin tone and tightens pores overnight

verdict: BIODANCE Bio-Collagen Mask is a genuine innovation. The collagen hydrogel dissolves into the skin, making it one of the most effective single-use hydration treatments available. Remarkable pore-tightening visible by morning.
